records.ety: [From L. deplere to empty out; de- + plere to fill. Forined like replete, complete. See Fill, Full, a.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Depleted; p. pr. & vb. n. Depleting.]

defs: To empty or unload, as the vessels of human system, by bloodletting or by medicine.
To reduce by destroying or consuming the vital powers of; to exhaust, as a country of its strength or resources, a treasury of money, etc.
